description:
When the version check finds a newer release:
- Scan open/in_progress issues for label `beadwork-upgrade`
- If found: update title to 'Upgrade bw to X.Y.Z' and description with new version info, changelog, and instructions
- If not found: create a new P1 task with label `beadwork-upgrade`, title, and description
- Description template includes: current version, target version, relevant changelog entries, and the command `bw upgrade --yes`
- Fetch changelog using existing fetchChangelog/parseChangelog infrastructure from upgrade.go
title: Find-or-create upgrade bead
